description: GetDisplayName performs a raw dictionary lookup (DisplayNames[level]) without validating that the SkillLevel enum value is defined via Enum.IsDefined. If an invalid/undefined SkillLevel is passed (e.g., (SkillLevel)99 from a bad DTO cast or deserialization), this throws a raw KeyNotFoundException with no useful context.
suggestedFix: Add enum validation at the start of GetDisplayName: if (!Enum.IsDefined(typeof(SkillLevel), level)) throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException(nameof(level), level, $"Invalid skill level: {level}"); before the dictionary access.
